integrity.description: Verify no external scripts were used to solve the task

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target file is /home/ga/Documents/digital_ad_performance.xlsx. The 'Ad_Data' sheet must have the exact headers: 'CTR', 'CPC', 'CPA', 'ROAS'.
